works.title: Bondy
description: A **social networking platform** designed to facilitate event organization and foster real-life connections.
In my role, I led initiatives focused on enhancing user engagement through **A/B testing** of **recommendation algorithms** that optimized the feed and user flows.

I **designed the architecture of the front-end** to ensure scalability, performance, and an intuitive user experience. Additionally, I contributed to the **back-end development**, enabling smooth integration and functionality across the platform.

Key features I developed included a real-time chat system, an endlessly scrollable feed, location tracking, and push notifications. I also implemented caching and persistence strategies. Furthermore, I established efficient workflows for our team by integrating **CI/CD technologies**, which significantly enhanced our development processes.

works.title: DishForge - Your Personal Chef
description: An innovative **AI-powered application** that enhances cooking experiences by seamlessly merging AI capabilities with culinary artistry, created during a [Lablab Hackathon](https://lablab.ai/event/llama-2-hackathon-with-clarifai/rostisseries-delgado/dishforge).

The app allows users to interact through a **user-friendly interface**, where they can specify meal types, preferences, dietary restrictions, and available ingredients (leveraging **image recognition with YOLOv5**). **GPT-4** processes these inputs to generate coherent and personalized recipes, while **Stable Diffusion** visually presents the results.

As the lead on the **front-end development**, I integrated AI outputs in a visually appealing manner, managed **API calls**, and designed an **intuitive user interface**. Our team accomplished this project in **less than 48 hours**, collaborating closely to brainstorm, design, test, and iterate on ideas effectively.

works.title: Things - What is next?
description: A fully customizable **task and project management app** that suggests the most relevant task based on the user’s available time, helping them prioritize effectively without manual organization. Users simply indicate how much free time they have, and the app provides tailored suggestions.

I developed the app with **Flutter** to ensure a seamless **cross-platform** and responsive experience with a single codebase. Originally conceived as a web app to enhance accessibility, it is designed to be fully functional across all devices that support modern web browsing.

The app utilizes **Firestore** for real-time data updates, ensuring that task lists remain synchronized in real time across devices. Additionally, I integrated **Firebase Authentication** for secure user logins. The core features include a robust prioritization algorithm and a dynamic schedule generator, both developed through **Test-Driven Development (TDD)** process.
This solution provides a highly customizable interface, empowering users to tailor the app to their personal workflow, while ensuring that they are focusing on the right tasks at the right time.

works.title: Tunzaa
description: An **incremental savings app** designed to empower unbanked African consumers by enabling secure savings and purchases through a **curated marketplace**, in partnership with major brands like Tigo, Vodacom M-Pesa, and Samsung.

As a **front-end developer** turned **CTO**, I led a complete refactor of the app architecture, initially built in **React Native** and later reimagined with **Flutter** for enhanced code safety and talent acquisition. I also oversaw the development of an **M-Pesa Mini App** developed with a proprietary XML-based framework.

Beyond development, I managed the integration of **CI/CD technologies**, handled **server and database management**, and led a team of five developers, ensuring smooth operations and alignment across the project. Additionally, I took charge of **recruitment and training** for the development team.

works.title: TheBigFamily Jobs App
description: An application designed to **connect Ukrainian refugees** with employers, simplifying the job search process through an intuitive interface.
In just **10 short questions**, users could easily complete the process of matching with potential employers. The project was developed **voluntarily** in record time to meet urgent needs.

I developed and built the app from the ground up using **Flutter**. To align with the [NGO](https://www.thebigfamily.app/)'s existing workflow, I integrated an **automated form submission system**, ensuring the app responses were directly synchronized with **Google Forms** via **HTTP requests**. This approach streamlined their data management without requiring any additional tooling.
The solution increased user trust by moving away from impersonal forms, providing a **user-friendly and secure interface** for the refugee community.

works.title: Kedo
description: Kedo is a **social networking platform** designed to facilitate the creation, search, and sharing of plans, enabling users to connect and discover activities together.
Hired to build the app from scratch, I transformed a basic idea and a list of functionalities into a fully functional prototype, ensuring adherence to a tight budget and timeline constraints.

I was responsible for the entire development process, including **UI/UX design**, **frontend development** using **Flutter**, and **backend integration** with **Back4App**. This allowed for rapid deployment and easy scalability.

Key features I implemented include user search and invite capabilities, chat functionalities, and personalized plan recommendations, creating a seamless experience for users looking to engage with friends and find activities.

works.title: Cheering
description: A **simple yet effective app designed to uplift team spirits** by enabling users to create a lively atmosphere, even without traditional cheering materials.

Developed in just a few hours using **Unity**, I focused on building a user-friendly interface that allows users to easily set up their speakers and play audio tracks designed to generate enthusiasm and excitement.
The app features customizable sound effects and audio cues that can be triggered at various times during events, helping teams to maintain high energy levels.
I implemented a straightforward audio management system to ensure smooth playback and responsiveness, allowing users to make more noise than anyone else with just a few taps.
